revision.comment: Protected Template:Strong: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: Used in [[Template:Collapse top]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Delete "lang" parameter, per request from SMcCandlish
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]
{{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}
{{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
